modern-search-flagship.name: Modern Search Flagship
modern-search-flagship.tagline: Be the name AI and Google recommend when clients search.
modern-search-flagship.blurb: Clients no longer just Google a lawyer — they ask AI. Modern Search Flagship makes a firm the most visible, most-cited name across every surface that now decides where cases go: Google, Maps, and the AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini). Four tiers scale from single-market growth to total market dominance. Zero ad management fees, ever — you fund LSA, PPC, and paid media spend directly, and we take no commission.

items.label: AI Citation — Google AI surfaces (firm named in Google's AI answers)
AI Citation — External LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini)
AI Citation Magnet (proprietary citable data studies)
SEO, Practice Area Pages & E-E-A-T Content
Ad Management Fee (you fund spend directly — no commission)

modern-search-flagship.footnote: Zero ad management fees, ever. You fund LSA, PPC, and paid media spend directly — every dollar goes to cases, not commission.

modern-search-foundation.name: Modern Search Foundation
modern-search-foundation.tagline: Foundational visibility — get found and cited in AI and local search.
modern-search-foundation.blurb: The entry point into AI and local search. Modern Search Foundation gets a firm found, cited, and on the map across Google, the local pack, and the AI engines. It's the floor that establishes visibility — not a full market-dominance program. Most firms graduate into Modern Search Flagship as they scale.

items.label: AI Citation — External LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini)
SEO, Practice Area Pages & E-E-A-T Content
Paid Ads Management — LSA, Google & ChatGPT Ads (available in Dominance)
Digital PR, Awards & AI Citation Magnet

modern-search-foundation.footnote: Foundational visibility, not a dominance program. Upgrade path: Modern Search Flagship ($10K–$30K+/mo).

brand-identity-sprint.name: Brand Identity Sprint
brand-identity-sprint.tagline: 60 days. One identity everywhere. A brand your market remembers.
brand-identity-sprint.blurb: The Brand Identity Sprint builds the complete identity in 60 days — positioning, logo, color, typography, voice, copywriting, and the templates that carry it everywhere — so every search result, video, ad, and page a potential client touches says the same thing: this is the firm. Month one builds the identity; month two puts it to work. Drops into any plan with no retainer change.

items.label: Brand Voice & Messaging Guide (tagline, elevator pitch, key messages)
Conversion Copywriting — Key Pages (homepage, top practice areas, about)
Social Profile + Google Business Profile Visual Assets
Ad & Video Templates (thumbnails, lower thirds, ad frames)
Business Collateral (letterhead, business cards, email signatures)
Website Brand Application Spec (paint-by-numbers handoff for Ignite or your webmaster)

brand-identity-sprint.footnote: Pairs with Ignite Website Design — run the two together and the new site launches wearing the new brand. You keep every file, guide, and template permanently.

ignite-website-design.name: Ignite Website Design
ignite-website-design.tagline: A high-performance, conversion-built website engineered to turn traffic into signed cases.
ignite-website-design.blurb: Ignite Website Design captures and converts search, local, and AI-driven traffic into signed cases — built AI-ready so Google AI, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini can read and cite the firm from day one. A standalone offer that pairs naturally with Modern Search Flagship. Typically delivered within 90 days; no subscription required.

items.label: Custom Page Design (home, about, contact + core pages)
Attorney Bio Pages (built for trust + E-E-A-T)

notes.title: Pairs With: The Brand Identity Sprint ($12,000 · $6,000/mo × 2 · 60 days)
notes.body: A great site on a weak brand underperforms. Run the Brand Identity Sprint alongside the build and the new site launches wearing the new brand — one build, one identity, zero rework. Full scope in the Brand Identity Sprint SOW.

notes.title: Premium Hosting & Security ($375/mo, included by default)
notes.body: Managed enterprise hosting + 99.9% uptime, daily backups + one-click restore, malware monitoring, firewall, SSL & security hardening, performance tuning, and ongoing plugin/core/security updates. Opt-out available with a signed risk acknowledgment.

ignite-website-design.footnote: Pairs naturally with Modern Search Flagship. Day 31 onward continues under the Modern Search Flagship subscription, if subscribed.

video-authority-sprint.name: Video Authority Sprint
video-authority-sprint.tagline: 60 days. Sixty videos. We’ll make you the authority in your space.
video-authority-sprint.blurb: A 60-day video intensive that drops into any plan — no retainer change. Month one: our crew scripts, directs, and captures a full production day, then edits it into 60 finished videos (long-form plus Shorts) with 1–3 ad-ready cuts. Month two: every video optimized, schema-marked, and published across the core channels. Built to the same YouTube and AI-citation standard as Video Flagship, and yours permanently.

items.label: One Full Production Day (onsite, scripted & directed)
Filming — Done For You (lighting, audio, camera, delivery)
Shot Lists & Scripts Prepared in Advance
Publishing Across Core Channels: YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok

video-authority-sprint.footnote: Attaches to any Video Flagship or Modern Search plan. A one-time production intensive, not a retainer change. You keep every asset permanently.

video-flagship.name: Video Flagship
video-flagship.blurb: Video Flagship builds the E-E-A-T signal no text page can fake: your attorneys, on camera, answering the questions injured people actually ask — produced, optimized, and structured so YouTube, Google, and the AI engines can read, trust, and cite every video. Two ways to run it: Done-With-You ($5K, self-filmed with our coaching) or Done-For-You (Tiers 1–3, our crews direct professional shoots).

items.label: Core Channels: YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok

video-flagship.footnote: Pairs with Modern Search: Modern Search wins the text answers; Video Flagship wins the video answers. DWY is organic-only; paid video begins at DFY (Tier 1+).

search-authority-sprint.name: Search Authority Sprint
search-authority-sprint.tagline: A 90-day content and authority intensive. No dev access required.
search-authority-sprint.blurb: A 90-day intensive that builds the four assets Google and the AI engines use to decide which firm to recommend: authoritative practice-area content, high-authority editorial links, a fortified citation footprint, and a proprietary citable data study. Every deliverable is built and owned by the firm — no developer access or CMS handover required.

items.label: AI Citation Magnet — 1 Proprietary Citable Data Study
Digital PR Outreach Campaign for the Magnet

search-authority-sprint.footnote: Standalone: $18,000 over 90 days. Included at no additional cost with an annual Modern Search Flagship agreement — ask your strategist.

retired-pi-flagship.name: PI Flagship (retired)
retired-pi-flagship.tagline: Retired — superseded by Modern Search Flagship.
retired-pi-flagship.blurb: Legacy Personal Injury flagship tiers. Kept for reference; use Modern Search Flagship for new deals.

retired-hosting.name: Premium Hosting & Security (retired)
retired-hosting.blurb: Legacy standalone hosting listing. Now bundled with Ignite Conversion Design.

retired-ignite-website.name: Ignite Website Design (retired)
retired-ignite-website.blurb: Legacy website build. Superseded by Ignite Conversion Design.

retired-ai-citation-magnet.name: AI Citation Magnet (retired)
retired-ai-citation-magnet.blurb: Legacy standalone. Now a line item within Modern Search Flagship.

paid-media.name: Paid Media & Social
paid-media.tagline: Full-service paid media and social ads, run by a dedicated specialist.
paid-media.blurb: Full-service paid media management across Google Ads, LSA, Meta, and social, run by a dedicated Paid Media & Social specialist. The management fee scales with monthly ad spend; ad spend is billed separately and goes entirely to media — no commission.
paid-media.footnote: Management fee is tiered by monthly ad spend. Ad spend is billed separately — every dollar goes to media, not commission. Campaign setup takes approximately 7–10 business days before launch.

web-maintenance.name: Web Maintenance
web-maintenance.blurb: Ongoing website updates, technical improvements, and development support — tiered monthly pools of development hours (Authority / Ascend / Prestige / Apex).

social-media.name: Social Media Management
social-media.blurb: Done-for-you organic social management — content calendar, graphics, and short-form video across the firm's primary channels.

technical-geo-sprint.name: Technical Architecture & GEO Sprint
technical-geo-sprint.blurb: A 90-day intensive that strips technical friction and builds the Knowledge Graph needed to dominate AI-driven search (Gemini, Perplexity, ChatGPT).

high-dr-links.name: High DR Link Package
high-dr-links.blurb: Concentrated acquisition of high-authority backlinks to accelerate rankings and domain authority.

media-capture.name: On-Site Media Capture
media-capture.blurb: On-site production day capturing photo and video assets for the firm, delivered within 10 business days. One round of minor revisions included.

resources.name: Total Search Coverage SPIFF One Sheet
